objective: High-fidelity Android music player with advanced DSP controls, custom metadata management, and synchronized lyrics.

layers.domain: Use cases implicitly handled in ViewModels (due to project size), Song/Lyric models

ui_layer.MainActivity.kt: Entry point. Manages permissions, root Scaffold, BottomBar, and NavHost. Implements 'Reset-to-Root' navigation logic.
ui_layer.Navigation.kt: Definition of Screen sealed class (Library, Player, Favorites, Settings). Defines bottom navigation items.
ui_layer.MainViewModel.kt: Source of Truth for the UI. Processes songs from repository, applies search/sort/filter, manages favorites and custom metadata state.
ui_layer.PlaybackViewModel.kt: Exposes MediaController state. Handles playback commands, position tracking, and media item transitions.

screens.LibraryScreen.kt: Main library view with search, sorting chips, and song list.
screens.FavoritesScreen.kt: Filtered view of songs marked as favorites.
screens.NowPlayingScreen.kt: Full-screen player with album art, lyrics, and playback controls.
screens.EqualizerScreen.kt: Interface for 10-band EQ and playback parameters (speed/pitch).
screens.SettingsScreen.kt: App configuration, backup/restore, and theme selection.

service_layer.MusicService.kt: MediaSessionService implementation. Encapsulates ExoPlayer. Injects Android FX Equalizer. Synchronizes speed/pitch with DataStore flows.

data_layer.MusicRepository.kt: Queries MediaStore.Audio.Media. Handles content resolver logic to fetch local audio files.
data_layer.SettingsManager.kt: Manages DataStore. Stores: theme, sort order, favorite IDs, custom metadata (serialized), and EQ bands.
data_layer.BackupManager.kt: Serializes app state into JSON for export/import functionality.

audio_processing.equalizer: 10-band system EQ linked to audioSessionId. Bands stored as comma-separated milliBels.
audio_processing.time_stretch: Sonic-based speed and pitch shifting via PlaybackParameters.
audio_processing.gapless: Enabled by default via ExoPlayer's playlist management.

data_reactivity.song_list_pipeline: combine(rawSongs, searchQuery, sortOrder, customMetadata) -> enriched and filtered list.
data_reactivity.metadata_overrides: User-edited titles/artists in DataStore take precedence over MediaStore tags in the UI layer.

lyrics_system.ui_sync: LyricsView uses LazyListState.animateScrollToItem synced with PlaybackViewModel.currentPosition.

critical_engineering_rules.navigation_integrity: The Home button MUST trigger popBackStack(root, inclusive=false). Prevent cyclic navigation between Library and Settings.
critical_engineering_rules.state_immutability: UI must never mutate lists. All changes (favorite toggle, metadata edit) must go through ViewModel -> SettingsManager -> Flow emission.
critical_engineering_rules.resource_lifecycle: Always release MediaController future in PlaybackViewModel.onCleared(). Release Equalizer in MusicService.onDestroy().
critical_engineering_rules.permission_protocol: Request READ_MEDIA_AUDIO (API 33+) or READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE. Use takePersistableUriPermission for external LRC files.

maintenance_prompts.new_screen: Create screen in ui/screens, add to Screen sealed class, add to NavHost in MainActivity, and update navItems if needed.
maintenance_prompts.new_audio_effect: Initialize effect in MusicService.onCreate, bind to player.addListener(onAudioSessionIdChanged), and add control flow in PlaybackViewModel.
maintenance_prompts.data_schema_change: Update CustomMetadata.kt (serialize/deserialize) and SettingsManager.kt. Update BackupManager.kt to maintain compatibility.
